profile.name: Jhared Andrei
profile.about: I am learning about Web Development and Software Development.

projects.title: RPSc Game
projects.description: An interactive Rock-Paper-Scissors game featuring custom algorithmic opponent logic, local session score tracking, and a responsive arcade-inspired interface.

projects.title: Weather Forecast
projects.description: A dynamic weather portal that queries external REST APIs to parse and display real-time meteorological data, regional conditions, and multi-day climate projections.

projects.title: Chat Server
projects.description: A real-time, multi-user messaging system leveraging persistent WebSocket connections for instant communication channels and active user state updates.
